title: Airbnb Vs. Booking Holdings: Which Stock Is The One To Watch In 2022?
text: Airbnb is expected to be profitable by fiscal 2022, but Booking should remain the more profitable of the two companies in the foreseeable future. Booking's valuation multiples are significantly lower than Airbnb's, and are also appealing on an absolute basis.

title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Boosts Business Travel Reach With KAYAK
text: Booking Holdings' (BKNG) KAYAK for Business incorporates Southwest Airlines into its platform to help travelers better plan business trips.

title: Booking's KAYAK Integrates Southwest Airlines Into Business Travel Platform
text: KAYAK, part of Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: BKNG), has integrated Southwest Airlines Co (NYSE: LUV) into its KAYAK for Business platform. The move aims to make the process of booking a business trip and earning Southwest Rapid Rewards points easier.

title: Southwest Airlines Now Available on KAYAK for Business
text: STAMFORD, Conn., Jan. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, KAYAK for Business , KAYAK's free corporate travel solution has integrated Southwest Airlines® into its platform making the process of booking a business trip and earning Southwest Rapid Rewards points easier.

title: 7 Travel and Tourism Stocks to Reserve Now for a Rebound in 2022
text: As Covid-19 recedes to the background and the pent-up demand for travel unleashes, tourism stocks are looking better with each passing day. The post 7 Travel and Tourism Stocks to Reserve Now for a Rebound in 2022 appeared first on InvestorPlace.
